message:
fix(sync): correct function signatures for auth and branch parameters

Fix type signatures in sync_git_repo and fetch_git_repo to use the
correct resolved types consistently.

sync_git_repo():
- Add branch_override: Option<&str> parameter for explicit branch control
- Change auth parameter from Option<&RemoteAuth> to &ResolvedAuth
- The auth should always be resolved before calling sync operations

fetch_git_repo():
- Change auth parameter from Option<&RemoteAuth> to &ResolvedAuth
- Matches the pattern established by sync_git_repo

This ensures:
- Consistent use of resolved credentials throughout sync operations
- Proper branch override support in sync workflow
- Type safety preventing use of unresolved RemoteAuth configs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
